commands.repair_reason: - [P2] Maintainers need to choose upgrade behavior, landing order, and MXC availability strategy; there is no narrow automated repair remaining from this review pass.; Cleared: No concrete security defect remains after the current head fixed the UI-containment issue; sandbox-boundary changes remain visible as merge risks for maintainer review. (sha=5439593abfc887c3e0e4c09451e61bd8001618d8)
commands.review_summary:
This PR bumps `@microsoft/mxc-sdk` to 0.7.0, adds explicit MXC processcontainer support for Windows 26200.8728+, changes sandboxed `system.run` fallback/env/shell handling, updates Sandbox status UX, and expands MXC/system.run tests.

Reproducibility: yes. from source for the central gap: current main still rejects Windows build 26200.8728 and uses MXC SDK 0.6.1. I did not independently run the Windows 26200 runtime path in this Linux checkout.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] Maintainers need to choose upgrade behavior, landing order, and MXC availability strategy; there is no narrow automated repair remaining from this review pass.
